bad_prompt: Five friends (Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve) are sitting in a row at a movie theater. Bob is sitting immediately to the left of David. Eve is sitting at one of the ends. Charlie is sitting somewhere to the right of Alice but to the left of Bob. Who is sitting in the middle seat?
good_prompt: Five friends (Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve) are sitting in a row at a movie theater. Bob is sitting immediately to the left of David. Eve is sitting at one of the ends. Charlie is sitting somewhere to the right of Alice but to the left of Bob. Who is sitting in the middle seat? Let's think step by step, explicitly deducing the position of each person one by one before giving the final answer.
